Application" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="120" x="20" y="46" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="resolv" parent="gke_lane" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;size=10;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;spacing=4;" value="<b>/etc/resolv.conf</b>

search ns.svc.cluster.local

169.254.169.254

coredns / unbound

Cache miss → forward" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="300" x="20" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_pod_cache" edge="1" parent="gke_lane" source="pod" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="nodecn" value="dig / nslookup"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="corends" parent="gke_lane" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#a9a9a9;fontSize=10;dashed=1;align=center;" value="<b>CoreDNS (kube-dns)</b>

Managed Resolver

(GCP-managed
anycast IP)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="150" x="380" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_cache_vpc" edge="1" parent="1" source="nodecn" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#1F4E79;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="vpc_dns" value="cache miss

suffix
check"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="decision" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;strokeWidth=2;" value="<b>Domain
Suffix
Match?</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="110" x="555" y="185" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rp_zone" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;strokeWidth=2;align=center;" value="<b>1. Response Policy</b>
<font style="font-size:9px">Highest Priority</font>

Override specific
records inline

Returns custom
answer directly" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="160" x="690" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="peering_zone" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;strokeWidth=2;align=center;" value="<b>2. DNS Peering Zone</b>
<font style="font-size:9px">Pull from peered VPC</font>

Zone replicated
from peer VPC
over VPC Peering

No target IP needed" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="160" x="690" y="185" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fwd_zone" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;strokeWidth=2;align=center;" value="<b>3. Forwarding Zone</b>
<font style="font-size:9px">Forward to target IPs</font>

Domain suffix
matched: aibang.

FORWARD to
target IPs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="160" x="690" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="default_rec" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#a9a9a9;fontSize=10;strokeWidth=2;align=center;" value="<b>4. Default Recursion</b>
<font style="font-size:9px">No match</font>

Cloud DNS recurses
to public internet

Root → TLD →
Authoritative NS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="160" x="690" y="395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_decision_rp" edge="1" parent="1" source="decision" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.2;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="rp_zone" value="Response

matches"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_decision_peering" edge="1" parent="1" source="decision" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="peering_zone" value="Peering

matches"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_decision_default" edge="1" parent="1" source="decision" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#a9a9a9;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="default_rec" value="no match"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fwd_target" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;strokeWidth=2;align=center;" value="<b>Target DNS Server</b>
10.0.100.53

Unbound / BIND
/ Corporate DNS

10.0.50.20"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="publicnet" parent="1" style="shape=cloud;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#a9a9a9;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>Public Internet</b>

Root DNS

TLD DNS (.com, .org...)
↓
Authoritative NS
(e.g. google.com)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="150" x="875" y="395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_default_public" edge="1" parent="1" source="default_rec" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#a9a9a9;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="publicnet" value="recurses
public DNS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_public_vpc" edge="1" parent="1" source="publicnet" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#a9a9a9;strokeWidth=2;strokeDashPattern=8 3;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.8;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="vpc_dns" value="answer"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="answer_pod" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;strokeWidth=2;align=center;" value="<b>Answer returned to Pod</b>
A record: 10.0.50.20

Cached at
Node Local DNS Cache
(for repeat queries)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="150" x="380" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_vpc_pod" edge="1" parent="1" source="vpc_dns" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;strokeDashPattern=8 3;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;exitY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="answer_pod" value="answer"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vpc_binding" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;align=left;spacing=4;spacingTop=4;" value="<b>VPC Binding — Critical!</b>
<font style="font-size:9px">Zone is INERT until bound to VPC</font>

gcloud dns managed-zones create ... \
 --visibility=private \
 --networks=https://.../my-vpc

gcloud dns managed-zones update ... \
 --add-private-gcp-network=...

Check: gcloud dns managed-zones describe ZONE \
 → visibility should be "private"
 → forwardingConfig / peeringConfig populated" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="1000" x="20" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="proto_label1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#5A5A5A;align=center;" value="UDP/TCP :53" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="70" x="305" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="proto_label2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#5A5A5A;align=center;" value="UDP/TCP :53" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="70" x="830" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#1F4E79;align=left;" value="<b>Legend</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="60" x="20" y="660" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_red" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#b85450;align=left;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;rounded=1;" value="<b>High Priority</b> — Response Policy (override inline)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="260" x="90" y="658" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_purple" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#9673a6;align=left;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;rounded=1;" value="DNS Peering Zone (pull from peer VPC)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="230" x="355" y="658" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_green" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#82b366;align=left;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;rounded=1;" value="Forwarding Zone (forward to target IPs)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="230" x="590" y="658" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_gray" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#a9a9a9;align=left;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#a9a9a9;rounded=1;" value="Default Recursion (public internet)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="210" x="825" y="658" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="priority_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#5A5A5A;align=left;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;rounded=1;" value="<b>Priority:</b> Response Policy > DNS Peering > Forwarding Zone > Default Recursion" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="1015" x="20" y="690" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ndots_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#5A5A5A;align=left;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;rounded=1;" value="<b>ndots:5</b> — If query has &lt;5 dots, search domains are appended first (e.g. "my-svc" → "my-svc.ns.svc.cluster.local").
This can cause delay for internal names if ndots is too high — consider ndots:2 for internal-heavy workloads." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="1015" x="20" y="715" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

1. Response Policy
Highest Priority
Override specific
records inline
Returns custom
answer directly

Pull from peered VPC
Zone replicated
from peer VPC
over VPC Peering
No target IP needed

div.div:
VPC Binding — Critical!
Zone is INERT until bound to VPC
gcloud dns managed-zones create ... \
--visibility=private \
--networks=https://.../my-vpc
gcloud dns managed-zones update ... \
--add-private-gcp-network=...
Check: gcloud dns managed-zones describe ZONE \
→ visibility should be "private"
→ forwardingConfig / peeringConfig populated

div.div:
ndots:5 — If query has <5 dots, search domains are appended first (e.g. "my-svc" → "my-svc.ns.svc.cluster.local").
This can cause delay for internal names if ndots is too high — consider ndots:2 for internal-heavy workloads.

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
